subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the state of the soul who, in this divine Day, hath hearkened unto His Call and turned toward the horizon of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نیکوست حال نفسیکه در یوم الهی باصغای ندایش فائز شد و بافق امرش توجه نمود
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
